   "notes": "AI triage (gemini): Resizing the application window should not cause active remote connections to drop. This indicates a failure in handling UI resize events within the protocol implementations.\nApproach: Ensure that ProtocolBase derived classes (RDP, VNC, Putty) correctly implement ResizeEnd to update their internal controls' dimensions and potentially inform the remote host.  }

   "github_updated_at": "2026-02-21T10:23:19Z",
   "body_snippet": "Under \"Inheritance\", there are 2 sets of fields with the same names, even though their functions are different:\r\n1) \"Minutes To Idle\".  The 2nd field with this name should probably be labelled \"Alert on disconnect due to idle\".\r\n2) \"Disable Cursor Shadow\".  Both fields with this name appear to have the same help text.
